description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a compact, armored fuselage and a pair of forward-swept wings that curve downward and forward, giving it a distinctive, aggressive profile. The body is primarily a mix of muted greenish-gray and off-white panels, with visible seams and panel lines suggesting a metallic construction. Two prominent engine intakes or exhausts are located on either side of the central fuselage, highlighted by red accents. The tail section features a pair of swept-back stabilizers arranged in an H-tail configuration, adding to its advanced, tactical appearance. The cockpit is positioned at the front, integrated smoothly into the fuselage with a faceted canopy. The surface finish is matte with subtle weathering, indicating use in urban or rugged environments.
description: A compact, futuristic airplane with forward-swept wings, an H-tail, and a matte greenish-gray and off-white finish. The design features a front cockpit and prominent engine intakes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the aggressive forward-swept wings, central cockpit, and red-accented engine intakes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, curved wings, and the angular tail stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the H-tail configuration and the twin swept-back stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the wing curvature and the streamlined body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Forward-swept, low-wing configuration with pronounced downward curvature and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the fuselage sides.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin swept-back horizontal stabilizers and a central vertical fin.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable or concealed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a faceted canopy, likely single-seat.
